name: Moving Platform
description: A platform that moves back and forth between two positions using a timeline-like ping-pong pattern. Uses SetTimerByFunctionName with alternating MoveToLocation calls via a boolean toggle.

customizable.start_message: Message on begin play (default: Platform Active)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_MovingPlatform}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="{{start_message|Platform Active}}"]
NODE n3: Delay [Duration={{move_time|3.0}}]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="Platform moving..."]
NODE n5: Delay [Duration={{move_time|3.0}}]
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="Platform returning..."]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Completed -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Completed -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n3.Execute

example_spawn.notes: Set EndPos variable after spawning to define the second position. Platform ping-pongs between StartPos (auto-set from spawn location) and EndPos.
